message:
bd-ml2r.12.4: add canary rollout state machine and drill tests

Implements FNX canary rollout infrastructure with deterministic rollback:
- RolloutPhase enum (Disabled, Canary, Partial, Full, RolledBack)
- HealthCriteria with error rate/latency thresholds
- RollbackReason variants for error, latency, quality, determinism
- Traffic sampling: 1% canary, 10% partial, 100% full
- 12 unit tests + 12 E2E drill tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
